entry.title: Introducing LTX as an Open World Models Company
entry.summary: LTX announces its evolution into an open world models company, building foundational AI that understands and simulates physical reality for film, robotics, and industry

entry.title: Introducing The New LTX Trainer: One Framework, Every Training Mode
entry.summary: LTX Trainer now supports video, audio, and cross-modal conditioning modes in one flexible framework: train LoRAs, IC-LoRAs, and full fine-tunes with full ownership.

entry.title: LTX 2.3 Offers Creative Intelligence Without the Cloud Costs
entry.summary: With local inference and open weights, LTX 2.3 reshapes the economics of AI video by eliminating recurring cloud spend and enabling secure, high-volume enterprise use.

entry.title: LTX and the Democratization of Creative Production
entry.summary: LTX CEO Zeev Farbman shares the vision behind LTX's approach and why self-funded, efficient AI models are democratizing creative production.

entry.title: LTX-2 Is Now Open Source — Full Model Weights Released
entry.summary: LTX open-sources LTX-2, making its most advanced AI video foundation model freely available to developers and researchers worldwide.

entry.title: Artificial Analysis Ranks LTX-2 Among Top AI Video Models
entry.summary: LTX-2 Pro ranks #3 on Artificial Analysis, independently validating its place among the world's top-performing AI video generation models.

entry.title: LTX-2, Foundation AI Video Model, Is Released
entry.summary: LTX launches LTX-2, a foundation model with synchronized audio and video generation, native 4K at 50fps, and 10-second sequences in a single production-ready system.

entry.title: LTX Studio Integrates Google's VEO 3 in Platform
entry.summary: LTX integrates Google's Veo 3 into LTX Studio, giving Pro users access to cinematic-quality video with realistic AI-generated audio alongside LTXV's real-time creative engine.

entry.title: LTX Video Model Trained on 13 Billion Parameters Launched
entry.summary: LTX releases LTX Video 0.9, a 13-billion-parameter open-source model that delivers industry-leading cinematic quality in real time, a major leap from its 2B-parameter debut.
